items.title: Tithe Act 1832
items.description: An Act for shortening the Time required in Claims of Modus decimandi, or Exemption from or Discharge of Tithes.

items.title: Lord Chancellor’s Pension Act 1832 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to abolish certain Sinecure Offices connected with the Court of Chancery, and to make Provision for the Lord High Chancellor on his Retirement from Office.

items.title: Excise Permit Act 1832 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to consolidate and amend the Laws regulating the granting and issuing of Permits for the Removal of Goods under the Laws of Excise.

items.title: Allotments Act 1832 (repealed 5.11.1993)
items.description: An Act to authorize (in Parishes inclosed under any Act of Parliament) the letting of the Poor Allotments in small Portions to industrious Cottagers.

items.title: Game (Scotland) Act 1832 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for the more effectual Prevention of Trespasses upon Property by Persons in pursuit of Game in that Part of Great Britain called Scotland.

items.title: Prescription Act 1832
items.description: An Act for shortening the time of prescription in certain cases.

items.title: Ecclesiastical Corporations Act 1832 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to authorize the identifying of Lands and other Possessions of certain Ecclesiastical and Collegiate Corporations.
